steps.title: Substitute the point into slope-intercept form
steps.content:
We know the slope is $m = -\frac{1}{3}$ and the line passes through $(9, 4)$. Substitute the point into the slope-intercept form:
$$4 = -\frac{1}{3}(9) + b$$

steps.title: Solve for the y-intercept and match to the answer
steps.content:
Simplify the right side:
$$4 = -3 + b$$
$$b = 7$$
The equation is $y = -\frac{1}{3}x + 7$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
